assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a Google identity or can create one.
No Google Cloud project, billing account, product, or job-function path exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Google Cloud account and reach the earliest meaningful hosted workload first success on Google Cloud.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved: official platform get-started presents co-equal job-function setup paths rather than one workload terminal.
first_success.observable_signal: A bounded product route such as opening a deployed Cloud Run sample URL is a candidate, not a platform-selected default.

route_selection.surface: Google Cloud console and Free Trial signup, after platform get-started
route_selection.rule: Select a shortest complete route only after the job-function or product outcome is fixed; do not invent a winner among co-equal official paths.

candidates.name: Platform get-started by job function
candidates.reason: Get started with Google Cloud lists six co-equal setup tracks: IT administration, FinOps, Security, DevOps, Application development, and Data analysis.

candidates.name: Cloud Run sample container console deploy
candidates.reason: Complete console path to a public service URL, but it is one product quickstart among many Google Cloud products and is not designated as the platform default.

candidates.name: Jump Start Solutions or Free Tier product trials
candidates.reason: Marketing and free-program pages present multiple pre-built solutions and product-specific free trials without selecting one first-success outcome.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a Google Cloud account from the Free Trial or console entry.

required_fields.label: Google identity
required_fields.notes: Official pages require signing in or creating a Google Cloud account; exact public signup controls behind Google identity were not fully enumerated in this audit.

required_fields.label: Payment method for Free Trial identity verification
required_fields.notes: Free Trial signup requires a valid credit card or other payment method; covered trial usage is not billed until upgrade.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can open the Google Cloud console with Free Trial or billing context.

required_path.action: Select one job-function setup track or one product workload route before reconstructing the remaining required path.
required_path.observable_result: One bounded Google Cloud first-success route is fixed.

prerequisites.description: A Google identity that can own or access a Google Cloud billing-enabled project for most deploy quickstarts.

external_gates.description: Free Trial signup uses a payment method for identity verification and may require bank authorization holds.

unavoidable_waits.description: Payment authorization can remain pending for bank processing before Free Trial credit is fully usable.

platform_outcomes.description: Signing up for Free Trial creates a billing account with $300 Welcome credit for 90 days when identity verification succeeds.

excluded.item: Reading Get started with Google Cloud documentation
excluded.reason: Documentation is evidence for route selection, not a counted product action.

excluded.item: Committing Cloud Run as the universal Google Cloud first success
excluded.reason: The platform get-started router presents co-equal job-function paths; Cloud Run is product-specific.

sources.title: Free Google Cloud features and trial offer
evidence_supported: Payment method required for identity verification

sources.title: Google Cloud Free Trial and Free Tier
evidence_supported: Multiple product free-tier and solution offers

uncertainties.question: Which job-function or product first-success outcome should define the Google Cloud shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Required actions, billing gates, and terminal signals differ across Application development setup, Cloud Run deploy, Jump Start Solutions, and other product quickstarts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one bounded developer goal, then a fresh walkthrough of that route from Free Trial signup through the observable terminal.

uncertainties.question: What exact public signup fields appear for a new Google identity Free Trial flow in the current console?
uncertainties.impact: Field counts for account creation cannot be verified without inventing controls behind Google sign-in.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots or a read-only walkthrough of the live Free Trial signup forms for a new account.
